examples.text: halting cell growth and cutting short their ability to replicate. Aging also involves stem cells that reside in many tissues and have the property of dividing without limits to replenish other cells. As we get older, stem cells decrease in number and tend to lose their regenerative potential,

source.text: 我们身体为何会老化？ - 莫妮咔 玛抐斯妮
